items.title: YaB stalled-tree close-out: clean .bak, set EOL policy, fix BOM, ship in two commits
items.prompt: YaB's 2026-06-06 bar-raise verdict is 'stalled' (fifth consecutive). Head is e6cac08 (2026-05-29), eight days cold, and the working tree is now 26+ uncommitted items that are no longer doc-only, so the old 'one doc-only commit closes it' plan is dead. Close it out in this order: (1) git-unstick the unremovable .git/index.lock from the Windows side first (sandbox rm returns Operation-not-permitted); (2) delete scripts/discord-notify.ps1.bak and scripts/uninstall-yab-protocol.ps1.bak, or add '*.bak' to .gitignore; (3) fix the UTF-8 BOM (ef bb bf) the overnight drift pass stamped onto scripts/discord-notify.ps1 and scripts/uninstall-yab-protocol.ps1 (release.ps1 does not carry a BOM); (4) add a .gitattributes with '* text=auto' and renormalize once so the CRLF flip stops recurring every session; (5) fix em-dash voice violations in docs/DECISIONS.md (D-001..D-007) and the CANONICAL_AUDIT reports before commit (run solo-dev-voice-audit), and decide whether the auto-generated audit reports get the same scrub or are exempted; (6) ship in two coherent commits through scripts/release.ps1: 'docs(yab): land F1-F11 canonical batch + 05-29..06-06 audit/bar-raise reports' and 'chore(yab): cross-project cwd guard (CLAUDE.md command rule + script self-location)'.
